case_title: ISAAK ERLIKH VS. JASON M CHANG et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-13-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-13-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTION PAYMENT $200. PAID FOR ON SANCTION ORDER DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ERLIKH, ISAAK

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERLIKH, ISAAK AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, JASON M CHANG, JACK C DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-03-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-21-2002
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST SCOTT J. KAUFFMAN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-05-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-20-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LISA SARTO, CSR#8994. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
